title: The gender gap in Türkiye’s labor force participation is narrowest in the highest level of education
subtitle: Labor force participation, by gender and level of education (% of population ages 15-64), 2024
textParagraph: At all levels of education in Türkiye, women are less likely than men to work. But the gap is narrowest among those who have completed tertiary education.
source: International Labour Organization (ILO), Education and Mismatch Indicators database (EMI)
visdescription: This chart shows the participation rates of women and men in the labor force in the x-axis categorized by level of education on the y-axis.
